messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Build a dashboard module with auth and an API, with unit tests and database stubs. Include modules A and B.
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Build a dashboard module with auth and an API, with unit tests and database stubs. Include modules A and B.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "project-setup",
      "title": "Initialize project skeleton",
      "description": "Create repository structure, package configuration, code style, and placeholder directories for dashboard, auth, api, module-a, and module-b.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Repository created with package manifest, linting config, CI pipeline stub, and directories: dashboard/, auth/, api/, module-a/, module-b/."
    },
    {
      "id": "design-auth-and-api",
      "title": "Design authentication and API contracts",
      "description": "Define auth flow (login, token format, middleware) and API endpoints for the dashboard including request/response schemas and error cases.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "project-setup"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Documented auth flow and API contract (OpenAPI or equivalent) available in repo; endpoints mapped to dashboard features and modules A/B."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-auth-module",
      "title": "Implement authentication module",
      "description": "Develop authentication middleware, token issuance/validation, and user session handling based on the designed auth flow.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "project-setup",
        "design-auth-and-api"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "high",
      "successCriteria": "Auth module integrates with API middleware, issues and validates tokens per design, and has basic unit tests demonstrating successful and failed auth scenarios."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-module-a",
      "title": "Implement Module A (data aggregation)",
      "description": "Build Module A to provide dashboard data aggregation logic and public interface used by API endpoints.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "project-setup",
        "design-auth-and-api"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Module A exposes documented functions/classes, returns correct aggregated results for sample inputs, and includes unit tests for core logic."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-module-b",
      "title": "Implement Module B (visualization utilities)",
      "description": "Develop Module B to provide visualization utilities and DTOs consumed by the dashboard API and frontend.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "project-setup",
        "design-auth-and-api"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Module B provides utilities and data transformation functions with tests and example outputs matching API contract."
    },
    {
      "id": "api-endpoints-and-database-stubs",
      "title": "Implement API endpoints and database stubs",
      "description": "Create dashboard API routes that use auth middleware, call Module A and B, and wire in database stubs that simulate persistence and queries.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-auth-module",
        "implement-module-a",
        "implement-module-b"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "high",
      "successCriteria": "API endpoints implemented and routable, protected by auth; database stubs emulate CRUD operations; integration tests exercise endpoints with stubs."
    },
    {
      "id": "unit-tests-and-ci",
      "title": "Write unit tests and configure CI",
      "description": "Implement unit tests covering auth, modules A/B, API endpoints, and database stubs; configure CI to run test suite on commits.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "api-endpoints-and-database-stubs",
        "implement-auth-module",
        "implement-module-a",
        "implement-module-b"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Unit test coverage meets agreed threshold (e.g., 80%) for targeted components, and CI pipeline runs tests successfully on a sample commit."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Functional decomposition by layer: project setup, design, implement auth and core modules (A and B), implement API and database stubs, then unit tests and CI to validate integration."
}
